task_completion.description: A cylinder primitive is created in the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Cylinder' object is listed in the Tree View panel on the left side of the FreeCAD interface, and a 3D cylinder is visible in the main viewport.

task_completion.description: The cylinder radius is set to 15 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View panel (usually bottom left) with the Cylinder selected, the 'Radius' property under the Data tab is explicitly set to '15.00 mm'.

task_completion.description: The cylinder height is set to 50 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View panel with the Cylinder selected, the 'Height' property under the Data tab is explicitly set to '50.00 mm'.

task_completion.description: The cylinder is centered at the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View panel, the 'Placement' -> 'Position' values for x, y, and z are all '0.00 mm', or the 3D viewport shows the cylinder perfectly aligned with the central axis crosshair.

task_completion.description: The document is saved to the specified path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar displays 'cylinder_model.FCStd', or a file manager/save dialog screenshot shows the file 'cylinder_model.FCStd' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeCAD application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard FreeCAD interface (menus, toolbars, Tree View, Property View) being actively used, rather than a text editor or terminal window mocking the output.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or adjusted the parameters in the FreeCAD interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking into the Property View fields for Radius and Height and typing the values, or using the FreeCAD Python console directly within the app.

integrity.description: The agent used the save functionality to write the file to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box is visible in the trajectory navigating to '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' and entering the filename, proving the file wasn't just moved via terminal behind the scenes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires creating a cylinder with exact parameters: Radius = 15 mm, Height = 50 mm. It must be centered at the origin (x=0, y=0, z=0). The final file must be saved exactly as 'cylinder_model.FCStd' in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.
